name: Cream Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add the cream, mixing until a dough forms.
4. Roll out on a floured surface to about 1/2-inch thickness.
5. Cut with a 2-inch cutter and place on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake in a hot oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
